# GoudEngine Go SDK

[![Go Reference](https://pkg.go.dev/badge/github.com/aram-devdocs/GoudEngine/sdks/go/goud.svg)](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/aram-devdocs/GoudEngine/sdks/go/goud)

> **Alpha** -- This SDK is under active development. APIs change frequently. [Report issues](https://github.com/aram-devdocs/GoudEngine/issues)

Thin Go wrapper over GoudEngine's FFI layer via cgo.

## Installation

```bash
go get github.com/aram-devdocs/GoudEngine/sdks/go
```

Requires the native engine library. Build it first:

```bash
cargo build --release
```

## Quick Start

```go
package main

import "github.com/aram-devdocs/GoudEngine/sdks/go/goud"

func main() {
    game := goud.NewGame(800, 600, "My Game")
    defer game.Destroy()

    tex := game.LoadTexture("assets/player.png")

    for !game.ShouldClose() {
        game.BeginFrame(0, 0, 0, 1)

        if game.IsKeyJustPressed(goud.KeyEscape) {
            game.Close()
        }

        game.DrawSprite(tex, 400, 300, 64, 64, 0, goud.ColorWhite())
        game.EndFrame()
    }
}
```

## Documentation

See the [Getting Started guide](../../docs/src/getting-started/go.md) for installation, project setup, and examples.

## Testing

```bash
cd sdks/go && CGO_ENABLED=1 go build ./...
```

## Platform Support

| OS | Architecture | Status |
|----|----|----|
| macOS | x64 / ARM64 | Supported |
| Linux | x64 | Supported |
| Windows | x64 | Experimental |

## Architecture

This SDK is a thin wrapper -- all engine logic lives in Rust. All files in `goud/` and `internal/ffi/helpers.go` are auto-generated by `codegen/gen_go_sdk.py` and `codegen/gen_go.py`. Do not hand-edit generated files.
